# Mermaid vendored bundle

- Package: `mermaid@11.16.0`
- Source: <https://www.npmjs.com/package/mermaid/v/11.16.0>
- License: MIT (see `LICENSE`)
- Bundle: ESM, browser target, minified with `esbuild@0.25.6`

The bundle is self-contained so the blog does not depend on a third-party CDN
at runtime. Update the versioned filename and the import in
`layouts/partials/extend_footer.html` when upgrading Mermaid.
